title: Simple Bookstore with Mongoose
statement: Build a REST API for a simple bookstore with Mongoose. The bookstore has books and authors. The API should allow you to create, read, and delete books. Each book has a title, author, and publication year. Each author has a name and birth year. When creating a book, you must also create the author if it does not exist. The API should handle errors properly, such as trying to create a book with a duplicate author or trying to delete a book that does not exist.
constraints: Must use only the in-memory array or mock database provided by Mongoose
Use Mongoose to define the schema for books and authors

endpoints.description: Create a new book. The request body should contain the title, author name, and publication year of the book.
Get a list of all books in the bookstore.
Get a book by its ID.
Delete a book by its ID.
